project_type: Full-stack app: Next.js 15 frontend + FastAPI backend with MCP servers
verification_instructions: Run pnpm build from frontend/ to verify no TypeScript/compilation errors
key_patterns: React state with useState/useEffect, localStorage as source of truth for tasks, optimistic updates with fire-and-forget API calls, Framer Motion animations, CSS variables for theming, z-index layering with z-[N] notation
directory_structure: frontend/app/dashboard/ - dashboard pages, frontend/components/ - shared components, frontend/lib/ - API helpers, backend/app/ - FastAPI server with agents and API routers
